message:
Fix parallel write data loss from dead busy_timeout (#109)

Three compounding bugs caused concurrent writes to silently fail:

1. `_lock_timeout_ms` parameter was unused (underscore prefix), so
   PRAGMA busy_timeout was never set despite config specifying 30s
2. BEGIN IMMEDIATE failures were fatal with no retry
3. COMMIT retry only handled BusySnapshot, not plain Busy

Fix: actually set PRAGMA busy_timeout, retry BEGIN IMMEDIATE on
transient errors with exponential backoff, broaden COMMIT retry
to use is_transient() covering all busy/conflict variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
